author: terencechain
content: <@1386598056320831509> is there a a preliminary version of builder api for gloas that we can look into implement and help test?

author: bharath.vedartham
content:
https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/138 the latest spec is here. I should take a look again and make sure its updated. 
The main contention points seem to be on request auth right now from what i understand

author: bharath.vedartham
content: outside the builder-api on a high level should be pretty straightforward. query a bid, put the bid in a block, send block back to builder, builder broadcasts the envelope

author: bharath.vedartham
content: there is also the max_trusted_bid broadcast, where we send the max_trusted_bid to the builder to set trust levels. The structure should be set IMO and we can iterate on it

author: terencechain
content:
Thanks! Will review today! 
Do we have a builder that support the new api today?

author: bharath.vedartham
content: nope, i m working on adding support to that in: https://github.com/ethpandaops/buildoor might take a bit

author: bharath.vedartham
content:
as we are starting to discuss the builder-api, one more aspect we need to discuss is mev-boost. epbs completely removes blind signing and I think clients can implement the functionality of fetching bids across multiple builders, select the best out of them and return the beacon block with the bid to the builder. 
Most of this is likely implementation detail but in the builder-specs we should define the inputs that clients take per builder like min-bid, bid-boost etc

author: bharath.vedartham
content: essentially we can make mev-boost optional and not have it as a hard requirement to access the builder market like today

author: terencechain
content: is signing bid defined as optional right now or mandatory?

author: bharath.vedartham
content: right now in the spec we define as mandatory. but I think making it optional is reasonable

author: pawandhananjay
content: Is `ethpandaops/geth:epbs-devnet-0` still the correct geth image right now?
